repos.readme_excerpt: DeepGEMM is a unified, high-performance tensor core kernel library that brings together the key computation primitives of modern large language models — GEMMs (FP8, FP4, BF16), fused MoE with overlapped communication (Mega MoE), MQA scoring for the lightning indexer, HyperConnection (HC), and more...
